summary: Returns the POSIX-style parent directory for a slash-delimited filesystem location after validating the input.
signature_intent: Accepts a single location string and returns a string naming its parent directory.
behavior: Validates the input before computing a result.
Treats forward slash as the directory separator.
Removes the final non-root segment and any trailing separators from the result boundary.
Returns the leading directory portion when a parent directory exists.
Preserves a double leading separator when it is the parent of the first segment.
edge_cases: Inputs with no parent directory return "." unless rooted.
